meta.context: Vitalik Buterin's local/self-sovereign AI stack and related projects

messaging_daemon.author: Vitalik Buterin
messaging_daemon.function: Unified local daemon polling Signal + email, SQLite storage, HTTP API
messaging_daemon.security_model: Human + LLM 2-of-2 confirmation for outbound messages
messaging_daemon.threat_model: LLM prompt injection via malicious messages → unauthorized sends
messaging_daemon.mitigation: Firewall: autonomous read-only + self-send; human gate for external

lucebox_hub.function: Hand-tuned LLM inference for specific consumer GPUs
lucebox_hub.philosophy: Local AI as default, not privilege; one chip at a time

optimizations.name: Megakernel
optimizations.technique: Single persistent CUDA dispatch, 82 blocks, 512 threads, no CPU round trips

optimizations.name: DFlash + DDTree
optimizations.result: 129.5 tok/s HumanEval (3.43× AR), up to 207 tok/s demo

optimizations.name: PFlash
optimizations.technique: Qwen3-0.6B drafter scores tokens, 27B target prefills retained spans

hardware_support: Ryzen AI MAX+ 395 (gfx1151, HIP) — 37 tok/s, 3.08× vs llama.cpp

voxterm.function: Local real-time voice transcription TUI with speaker diarization
voxterm.privacy_model: Local-first, no cloud APIs, no audio stored
features: Speaker diarization + voice tagging across sessions
P2P collaborative transcription over LAN (mDNS, AES-256-GCM)
Voice profiles encrypted at rest (AES-256-CBC, macOS Keychain)

leanstral.function: Application-specific fine-tuned LLM for Lean proof assistant
leanstral.capability: Holds own against 1T models on writing Lean code
leanstral.implication: Domain-specialized models >> general models for security-critical code

fv_blog.title: Formal Verification and AI
fv_blog.thesis: Application-specific fine-tuned LLMs (like Leanstral) are a huge boon for writing more secure code via formal verification
fv_blog.intersection: CROPS Ethereum access layer ↔ CROPS AI: ZK remote LLM calls also solve private RPC reads

vitalik_stack_summary.hardware: Nvidia 5090 laptop (24 GB VRAM) + AMD Ryzen AI Max Pro (128 GB unified) tested
vitalik_stack_summary.audio: stt-daemon (local transcription, no GPU for basic use)
vitalik_stack_summary.knowledge_base: 1 TB local Wikipedia dump + technical docs
security_principles: Human + LLM as two distinct confirmation factors
Require human confirmation for calldata-bearing txs

approaches: FHE (too slow for practical cloud inference today)
remote_inference.goal: Privacy-preserving remote LLM access without cloud dependency

crops_intersection_analysis.concept: CROPS = Cryptographic Robust Open Private Systems

ethereum_ai_convergence.shared_primitive: ZK proofs of computation correctness without data exposure

ethereum_ai_convergence.ethereum_application: Secure smart contract / EVM code generation
ethereum_ai_convergence.example: Leanstral for Lean → Ethereum-specific model for Solidity/Vyper/Yul

deepseek_v4_context.vitalik_observation: Proper multi-hardware support distinguishes 'decentralized AI' from genuine 'CROPS AI'
deepseek_v4_context.arkhe_relevance: Substrato 836 (GGUF) + 834 (WDF Driver Fabric) for cross-platform inference optimization

new_substrates_proposed.name: CROPS Local AI Stack
new_substrates_proposed.description: Self-sovereign local AI infrastructure: llama-server + messaging-daemon + sandboxing

new_substrates_proposed.name: Lucebox Inference Engine
new_substrates_proposed.description: Hand-tuned per-GPU inference optimizations: Megakernel, DFlash, PFlash

new_substrates_proposed.name: VoxTerm Audio Privacy Layer
new_substrates_proposed.description: Local-first voice transcription with P2P collaborative diarization

new_substrates_proposed.name: Leanstral Formal Verification Bridge
new_substrates_proposed.description: Domain-specific fine-tuned models for secure code generation and formal verification

new_substrates_proposed.name: ZK Remote LLM Access Layer
new_substrates_proposed.description: Privacy-preserving remote inference with ZK proofs + mixnets + TEE fallback
